pull_request.title: Implement Support response format tool mode for tool results

what_changed: Implement Support response format tool mode for tool results: contract compatibility with scope anchored on Update request and response contracts with compatibility-safe fallbacks
Implement Support response format tool mode for tool results: runtime integration wiring with scope anchored on Wire tool/runtime integration, schema handling, and retry-safe execution behavior
key_risks: Legacy callers should receive a deterministic contract error for unsupported request shapes.
Tool/schema mismatches must fail closed instead of running with partial permissions.
summary.rollback_notes: Disable rollout traffic, revert the deploy, and preserve compatibility fallbacks.

blocking_findings: Error rate exceeded the allowed production threshold.
non_blocking_findings: Carry open question: Do any existing Anthropic wrappers need compatibility shims before this change can ship?

Context assembly keeps validation and permission guardrails in place.
